name: On the Geometry of Learned Representations in Event-Based Multi-Modal Egomotion Estimation

description: arXiv:2607.15794v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Classical approaches to event-based egomotion estimation, including those adopted by the top-performing teams of the ELOPE challenge, rely on geometric optimization frameworks such as contrast maximization, homography estimation, or dense optical flow combined with analytic motion inversion. This work investigates the geometric structure that em...
author: Stefano Silvestrini, Michele Ceresoli
